panels.description: Current API HTTP requests per second.
panels.title: API Request Rate

panels.description: Average HTTP response time across all API endpoints.
panels.title: API Avg Latency

panels.description: Percentage of API requests returning 4xx/5xx status codes.
panels.title: API HTTP Error Rate

panels.description: Percentage of class method executions ending in error (operator + API).
panels.title: Process Error Rate

panels.description: Shows the percentage of errors per application  and method over the last 24 hours. Calculated as 100 * increase(error) / increase(error + success) from the reporting_process_time_seconds_count counter. Uses an instant query; each gauge represents one app. Sorted descending. Suggested thresholds: 1% (warn), 5% (critical).

targets.expr:
sort_desc(
  topk(
    10,
    100 *
    sum by (app, method) ( increase(anarchy_process_time_seconds_count{status="error", component=~"$component"}[1h]) )
    /
    clamp_min(
      sum by (app, method) ( increase(anarchy_process_time_seconds_count{status=~"error|success", component=~"$component"}[1h]) ),
      1
    )
  )
)

panels.title: Error Rate by App.Method - Last 24h

panels.description: Shows the percentage of errors per application over the last 24 hours. Calculated as 100 * increase(error) / increase(error + success) from the reporting_process_time_seconds_count counter. Uses an instant query; each gauge represents one app. Sorted descending. Suggested thresholds: 1% (warn), 5% (critical).

targets.expr:
sort_desc(
  100 *
  sum by (app) ( increase(anarchy_process_time_seconds_count{status="error", component=~"$component"}[1h]) )
  /
  clamp_min(
    sum by (app) ( increase(anarchy_process_time_seconds_count{status=~"error|success", component=~"$component"}[1h]) ),
    1
  )
)

panels.title: Error Rate by App - Last 24h

panels.description: This chart shows the average duration of process executions for each method, grouped by method and app over time.

targets.expr:
sum(rate(anarchy_process_time_seconds_sum{status="success", app=~"$app", component=~"$component"}[5m])) by (app)
/
sum(rate(anarchy_process_time_seconds_count{status="success", app=~"$app", component=~"$component"}[5m])) by (app)

panels.title: Average Duration by App $app

panels.description: This chart shows the 95th percentile of execution times, providing insights into the longest durations affecting most requests.

panels.description: This chart shows the total number of successful executions per method, updated every 5 minutes.

panels.title: Success vs Error Rate by App - $app

panels.description: This chart shows the average duration of process executions for each method, grouped by method and app over time.

targets.expr:
sum(rate(anarchy_process_time_seconds_sum{status="success", app=~"$app", component=~"$component"}[5m])) by (app, method)
/
sum(rate(anarchy_process_time_seconds_count{status="success", app=~"$app", component=~"$component"}[5m])) by (app, method)

panels.title: Average Duration by Method - $app

panels.description: This chart shows the 95th percentile of execution times, providing insights into the longest durations affecting most requests.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(anarchy_process_time_seconds_bucket{status="success", app=~"$app", component=~"$component"}[5m])) by (le, app, method))

panels.title: 95th Percentile (P95) Execution Time by Method - $app

panels.description: 99th percentile execution time per method within each class.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(anarchy_process_time_seconds_bucket{status="success", app=~"$app", component=~"$component"}[5m])) by (le, app, method))

panels.title: 99th Percentile (P99) Execution Time by Method - $app

panels.description: Table ranking methods by latency with average, P95, P99, and execution rate.

targets.expr: sum(rate(anarchy_process_time_seconds_sum{status="success", app=~"$app", component=~"$component"}[5m])) by (app, method) / sum(rate(anarchy_process_time_seconds_count{status="success", app=~"$app", component=~"$component"}[5m])) by (app, method)
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(anarchy_process_time_seconds_bucket{status="success", app=~"$app", component=~"$component"}[5m])) by (le, app, method))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(anarchy_process_time_seconds_bucket{status="success", app=~"$app", component=~"$component"}[5m])) by (le, app, method))

panels.title: Top Methods by Latency - $app
